version_description: This version is labelled as a No capo song but you can experiment, as well as with the key.

versions.version_description: Capo on 3rd fret. Very simple version of the chords that still sounds as close to the song. Stream Fine Line Dec. 13.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1: Harry Styles]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
Walk in your rainbow paradise (Paradise)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]           [ch]G#m[/ch]            [ch]A[/ch]               [ch]B[/ch]
Strawberry lipstick state of mind (State of mind)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]G#m[/ch]               [ch]A[/ch]
I get so lost inside your eyes[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]
Would you believe it?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus: Harry Styles]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
You don't have to say you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
You don't have to say nothing[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
You don't have to say you're mine[/tab]


[Chorus: Harry Styles]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]G#m[/ch]
Honey (Ah-ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]G#m[/ch]
Oh, honey (Ah-ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]A[/ch]        [ch]B[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]


[Verse 2: Harry Styles]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]          [ch]G#m[/ch]         [ch]A[/ch]            [ch]B[/ch]
Your wonder under summer sky (Summer sky)[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]            [ch]G#m[/ch]        [ch]A[/ch]
Brown skin and lemon over ice[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]
Would you believe it?[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus: Harry Styles]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
You don't have to say you love me[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
You don't have to say nothing[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]                             [ch]B[/ch]
You don't have to say you're mine[/tab]



[Chorus: Harry Styles]
[tab]       [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]G#m[/ch]
Honey (Ah-ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab]                       [ch]A[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]        [ch]G#m[/ch]
Oh, honey (Ah-ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C#m[/ch]       [ch]G#m[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]A[/ch]          [ch]B[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]


[Bridge: Amy Allen]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#m[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab][ch]A[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
[tab][ch]B[/ch]
It's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]


[Chorus: Harry Styles & Amy Allen]
[tab][ch]C#m[/ch]  [ch]G#m[/ch]                [ch]A[/ch]
  I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C#m[/ch]     [ch]G#m[/ch]
Oh, honey (Ah-ah-ah)[/tab]
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]                                       [ch]C#m[/ch]      [ch]G#m[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do (Ah-ah-ah)[/tab]

(It's the only thing I'll ever do, it's the only thing I'll ever do)
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you (It's the only thing I'll ever do)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C#m[/ch]             [ch]G#m[/ch]
Oh, honey (Ah-ah-ah), oh, honey[/tab]

(It's the only thing I'll ever do, it's the only thing I'll ever do)
[tab]                      [ch]A[/ch]
I'd walk through fire for you (It's the only thing I'll ever do)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you (It's the only thing I'll ever do)[/tab]


[Outro: Harry Styles]
[tab]     [ch]C#m[/ch]
Ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G#m[/ch]
Oh, honey[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]A[/ch]
Ooh, ooh[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]B[/ch]
Just let me adore you[/tab]
[tab]                              [ch]C#m[/ch]
Like it's the only thing I'll ever do[/tab]
